scope: Controlled repair loop for data_quality_review_001 on backend live_llm_text.

evidence_grounding.note: Agent artifacts show prompt/report/model-call landing and deterministic verifier reads them.

repair_attribution.note: A1 feedback `output_contract_error` triggered repair `rewrite_output_contract` and gate `accept`.

transferability.note: One controlled non-security slice only; not broad multi-domain generalization.

repeatability.note: Not measured for this single loop artifact.

cost_budget.note: Latency and token usage are available in backend metadata/model_calls but not normalized here.

verifier_robustness.note: Verifier distinguished A1 vs A2; before repair missing=['none'], schema_errors=['DATA_REQUIRED_FIELD_COVERAGE.recommended_fix', 'DATA_TEMPORAL_SPLIT_GUARD.recommended_fix', 'DATA_LABEL_ENUM_ALIGNMENT.recommended_fix'], weak_evidence=['none'].

human_plausibility.note: No human usefulness review is attached to this loop artifact.

claim_boundary: Single local live-LLM repair-loop evidence on one controlled non-security data-quality task; verifier and gate remain deterministic.
